typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		registry as string,
		repo as string,
		tag as string,
		cost_center_cio as string,
		cost_center_cio_direct as string,
		InsertedDateTime as timestamp,
		UpdatedDateTime as timestamp,
		scan_time as string,
		registry_type as string,
		image_distro_release as string,
		image_distro as string,
		image_id as string,
		image_labels as string,
		prisma_console as string,
		prisma_collections as string,
		package_name as string,
		package_version as string,
		package_path as string,
		package_type as string,
		vuln_id as string,
		vuln_cve as string,
		vuln_severity as string,
		vuln_cvss as string,
		vuln_status as string,
		vuln_cause as string,
		vuln_discovered as string,
		vuln_published as string,
		vuln_fix_date as string,
		vuln_description as string,
		vuln_derived_type as string,
		vuln_summary_fix_alignment as string,
		vuln_first_detected as date,
		vuln_last_detected as date,
		vuln_derived_status as string,
		is_compliant as string,
		due_date as date,
		derived_record_type as integer,
		distributed_app_id as string,
		vss_wf_risk_score as double,
		vss_wf_threat_rating as string,
		tag_date as date,
		prisma_reg_viid as string,
		prisma_reg_viid_hash_value as string,
		reopened_counter as integer,
		bam_au_owner as string,
		bam_managed_by as string,
		bam_supported_by as string,
		bam_cio_level_1 as string,
		bam_cio_level_2 as string,
		bam_cio_level_3 as string,
		bam_primary_tech_manager as string,
		bam_primary_tech_manager_email as string,
		bam_alternate_tech_manager as string,
		bam_alternate_tech_manager_email as string,
		bam_application_wf_guid as string,
		bam_business_app_name as string,
		bam_ci_type as string,
		bam_install_status as string,
		bam_operational_status as string,
		bam_business_app_classification as string,
		bam_short_description as string,
		bam_soc_1 as string,
		bam_sox_significant_code as string,
		bam_data_classification as string,
		bam_publicly_accessible as string,
		bam_pci as string,
		bam_hdpa as string,
		bam_lob as string,
		bam_paa_hosting_type_code as string,
		bam_customer_facing_code as string,
		bam_glba_flag as string,
		derived_primary_owner as string,
		bam_trtc as string,
		bam_trpc as string,
		repo_digests as string,
		package_purl as string,
		vuln_system_first_detected as date
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        * FROM            CAR_VulnRepts.dbo.vwPrismaRegistry_VulnsEnriched_Infra_DateFiltered  "With"(NoLock) WHERE (cost_center_cio LIKE \'TECHCOO%\' OR                        cost_center_cio LIKE \'TECHCDOT%\') and is_compliant = \'No\'',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> vwPrismaRegistryEnrichedInfraDateFiltered
vwPrismaRegistryEnrichedInfraDateFiltered derive(str_prisma_reg_viid = prisma_reg_viid,
		str_package_purl = toString(package_purl)) ~> DataConversion
DataConversion derive(UID = trim(str_prisma_reg_viid) + ';' + trim(package_purl) + ';',
		Import_Date = toDate(toString(currentDate(), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), "MM/dd/yyyy")) ~> DerivedColumn1
DerivedColumn1 sink(input(
		bam_managed_by as string,
		package_type as string,
		bam_primary_tech_manager as string,
		vuln_derived_status as string,
		prisma_reg_viid_hash_value as string,
		vuln_derived_type as string,
		cost_center_cio as string,
		bam_operational_status as string,
		tag as string,
		derived_record_type as integer,
		bam_sox_significant_code as string,
		vuln_cve as string,
		bam_trtc as string,
		distributed_app_id as string,
		bam_cio_level_3 as string,
		reopened_counter as integer,
		bam_cio_level_2 as string,
		vuln_cvss as string,
		bam_hdpa as string,
		bam_alternate_tech_manager as string,
		cost_center_cio_direct as string,
		InsertedDateTime as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		vuln_status as string,
		prisma_console as string,
		vss_wf_threat_rating as string,
		registry_type as string,
		derived_primary_owner as string,
		vuln_last_detected as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		bam_au_owner as string,
		bam_install_status as string,
		bam_soc_1 as string,
		UpdatedDateTime as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		vuln_first_detected as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		image_id as string,
		bam_cio_level_1 as string,
		vuln_description as string,
		bam_customer_facing_code as string,
		vuln_discovered as string,
		tag_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		bam_glba_flag as string,
		image_distro as string,
		package_purl as string,
		repo as string,
		repo_digests as string,
		vuln_summary_fix_alignment as string,
		bam_data_classification as string,
		image_distro_release as string,
		prisma_collections as string,
		vuln_fix_date as string,
		prisma_reg_viid as string,
		bam_application_wf_guid as string,
		bam_short_description as string,
		bam_alternate_tech_manager_email as string,
		image_labels as string,
		bam_business_app_classification as string,
		bam_publicly_accessible as string,
		vuln_severity as string,
		bam_lob as string,
		bam_supported_by as string,
		registry as string,
		vuln_cause as string,
		package_path as string,
		bam_trpc as string,
		due_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		vuln_published as string,
		Import_Date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		vss_wf_risk_score as double,
		bam_pci as string,
		bam_primary_tech_manager_email as string,
		vuln_id as string,
		package_version as string,
		bam_business_app_name as string,
		bam_paa_hosting_type_code as string,
		package_name as string,
		bam_ci_type as string,
		is_compliant as string,
		scan_time as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		bam_managed_by,
		package_type,
		bam_primary_tech_manager,
		vuln_derived_status,
		prisma_reg_viid_hash_value,
		vuln_derived_type,
		cost_center_cio,
		bam_operational_status,
		tag,
		derived_record_type,
		bam_sox_significant_code,
		vuln_cve,
		bam_trtc,
		distributed_app_id,
		bam_cio_level_3,
		reopened_counter,
		bam_cio_level_2,
		vuln_cvss,
		bam_hdpa,
		bam_alternate_tech_manager,
		cost_center_cio_direct,
		InsertedDateTime,
		vuln_status,
		prisma_console,
		vss_wf_threat_rating,
		registry_type,
		derived_primary_owner,
		vuln_last_detected,
		bam_au_owner,
		bam_install_status,
		bam_soc_1,
		UpdatedDateTime,
		vuln_first_detected,
		image_id,
		bam_cio_level_1,
		vuln_description,
		bam_customer_facing_code,
		vuln_discovered,
		tag_date,
		bam_glba_flag,
		image_distro,
		package_purl = str_package_purl,
		repo,
		repo_digests,
		vuln_summary_fix_alignment,
		bam_data_classification,
		image_distro_release,
		prisma_collections,
		vuln_fix_date,
		prisma_reg_viid,
		bam_application_wf_guid,
		bam_short_description,
		bam_alternate_tech_manager_email,
		image_labels,
		bam_business_app_classification,
		bam_publicly_accessible,
		vuln_severity,
		bam_lob,
		bam_supported_by,
		registry,
		vuln_cause,
		package_path,
		bam_trpc,
		due_date,
		vuln_published,
		Import_Date,
		vss_wf_risk_score,
		bam_pci,
		bam_primary_tech_manager_email,
		vuln_id,
		package_version,
		bam_business_app_name,
		bam_paa_hosting_type_code,
		package_name,
		bam_ci_type,
		is_compliant,
		scan_time)) ~> OLEDBDestination
